chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Bail Appln No.1700 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge 1. For order on MA No.9116/2025. 2. For hearing of bail application 05.08.2025 None present for the applicant. Mr. Fayaz Hussain Sabki, APG Sindh. PI/SIC Arshad Tanoli of PS Mochkow. ------------------------------- None present for the applicant. Non intimation is received. When this bail application was last listed for urgency on 02.07.2025 although an urgent application had been filed by the applicant, but none appeared on behalf of the applicant. Today the case is not different. SIP of PS Mochkow has filed report which is taken on record. Dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E Asif
